docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON III, MOSE AS TO DEFENDANT DARDINI, CONSTANCE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-29-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-28-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-09-1997

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF APR-29-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE FOR POS OR ORDER TO SERVE BY PUBLICATION. HEARING SET FOR JUN-04-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-04-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUN-04-1997, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO SHOW CAUSE WHY ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED OR SANCTIONED., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-19-1997 CONTINUED FROM JUN-04-1997 TO AUG-06-1997 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DARDINI, CONSTANCE DOES 1 TO 10
